reviews.comment:
O la Buenísima,  precio económicos por ser oficial ypf. Lo único criticable es el acceso no es muy bueno y le falta iluminación, señales para la llegada por qué como está metida para adentro,si no conoces la zona seguro que seguís de largo

(Translated by Google)
Or the Buenísima, with economical prices because it's an official YPF station. The only downside is the access; it's not very good and lacks lighting and signs to guide you, because since it's tucked away, if you don't know the area you'll surely miss it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZaW9UZzJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Bastante mal llevados los que atienden.
Yo entiendo que estén cansados porque muchos cargamos ahí! Pero si te trato bien hace lo mismo!!

(Translated by Google)
The staff there are pretty badly behaved.

I understand they're tired because many of us carry things there! But if I treat you well, I expect you to do the same!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZa3FpWVR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Como la mayoria de las estaciones de servicio YPF esta tambien cuenta con un gran buffet y un completisimo kiosko. Toda la onda los playeros siempre gente muy macanauda.

(Translated by Google)
Like most YPF gas stations, this one also has a large buffet and a fully equipped kiosk. The beach bar is always a great place to be, and they're always very cool.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZMElxT2FBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente opción,  estación grande y en buen estado. Cargamos antes de pasar a Uruguay, allí la nafta vale el doble

(Translated by Google)
Excellent option, large and well-maintained station. We filled up before crossing into Uruguay, where gas costs twice as much.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZbDhxV2ZnEAE
